Selling San Luis-style carnitas and barbacoa at $20/lb with fresh tortillas and salsa; orders at 3186929106, Sincere 101 Monroe.
Mary Mc asks if there are any Panamanians in Monroe and invites them to greet; no responses.
Naty Lopez selling tres leches cakes at $30 each; contact 318-334-3719 in Monroe LA.
Lilia Lopez urgently looking for where to register her car and get license plates; commenter recommends Flores Flores Flores as trustworthy.
Cristina Lopez shares a GoFundMe link (gofund.me/1b8aed9c) with no description.

Jesus Barbacoa offering taquiza catering for events: barbacoa, fajita, and pastor tacos with frijoles charros and disposables; all cooked on-site; free quote at 3186929106.
Announcing new restaurant Abuela's Restaurant opening soon at 1304 Lamy Lane Monroe — Mexican cuisine, great service, incredible prices; opening date TBD.
